assembly-v3: pick up the nut and place it onto the peg
the nut should be fastened onto the peg
basketball-v3: put the basketball into the hoop
the basketball should be inside the basket
bin-picking-v3: grasp the puck from one bin and place it into the other bin
the puck should be in the target bin
box-close-v3: grasp the cover and close the box with it
the box should be closed with its cover
button-press-topdown-v3: press the button from the top
the button should be fully pressed from above
button-press-topdown-wall-v3: bypass the wall and press the button from the top
the button should be pressed from above despite the wall
press button over wall from top
button-press-v3: the button should be fully depressed
button-press-wall-v3: bypass the wall and press the button
the button should be pressed despite the wall obstacle
coffee-button-v3: push the button on the coffee machine
the coffee machine button should be activated
coffee-pull-v3: pull the mug away from the coffee machine
the mug should be pulled out from the coffee machine
coffee-push-v3: push the mug under the coffee machine
the mug should be positioned under the coffee machine
dial-turn-v3: the dial should be turned to the opposite position
disassemble-v3: pick the nut off the peg
the nut should be removed from the peg
door-close-v3: close the door with its revolving joint
the door should be fully closed
door-lock-v3: lock the door by rotating the lock clockwise
the door lock should be engaged
door-open-v3: open the door with its revolving joint
the door should be fully open
door-unlock-v3: unlock the door by rotating the lock counter-clockwise
drawer-close-v3: the drawer should be fully closed
drawer-open-v3: the drawer should be fully open
faucet-close-v3: rotate the faucet clockwise to close it
the faucet should be turned off
faucet-open-v3: rotate the faucet counter-clockwise to open it
the faucet should be turned on
hammer-v3: grasp the hammer and drive the screw into the wall
the screw should be hammered into the wall
hand-insert-v3: insert the gripper into the hole
the gripper should be fully inserted into the hole
handle-press-side-v3: the handle should be pressed down from the side
handle-press-v3: the handle should be fully depressed
handle-pull-v3: the handle should be in the raised position
handle-pull-side-v3: the handle should be raised from the side
peg-insert-side-v3: insert the peg into the hole from the side
the peg should be fully inserted sideways
lever-pull-v3: the lever should be rotated down to a horizontal position
peg-unplug-side-v3: unplug the peg by pulling it out sideways
the peg should be removed from its socket sideways
pick-out-of-hole-v3: pick the puck up out of the hole
the puck should be lifted clear of the hole
pick-place-v3: pick up the puck and place it at the goal
the puck should be at the target location
pick-place-wall-v3: pick up the puck, bypass the wall, and place it at the goal
the puck should be placed at the goal on the other side of the wall
plate-slide-back-side-v3: retrieve the plate from the cabinet sideways
the plate should be pulled out of the cabinet from the side
plate-slide-back-v3: retrieve the plate from the cabinet
the plate should be pulled out of the cabinet
plate-slide-side-v3: slide the plate into the cabinet sideways
the plate should be inside the cabinet having entered from the side
plate-slide-v3: slide the plate into the cabinet
the plate should be stored inside the cabinet
reach-v3: reach the goal position with the end effector
the end effector should be at the goal location
reach-wall-v3: bypass the wall and reach the goal position
the end effector should reach the goal despite the wall
push-back-v3: pull the puck back to the goal
the puck should be returned to the goal position
push-v3: push the puck to the goal
the puck should be at the goal position
push-wall-v3: bypass the wall and push the puck to the goal
the puck should reach the goal on the other side of the wall
shelf-place-v3: pick up the puck and place it onto the shelf
the puck should be resting on the shelf
soccer-v3: kick the soccer ball into the goal
the soccer ball should be inside the goal
stick-pull-v3: grasp the stick and use it to pull the box to the goal
the box should be pulled to the goal using the stick
stick-push-v3: grasp the stick and use it to push the box to the goal
the box should be pushed to the goal using the stick
sweep-into-v3: sweep the puck into the hole
the puck should have fallen into the hole
sweep-v3: sweep the puck off the table
the puck should be swept off the table surface
window-close-v3: the window should be fully closed
window-open-v3: the window should be fully open
